name: "Can you pretend to be my bf?"
description:
A pretty woman blocked your way and asked if you could be her partner for a moment... What a ridiculous situation, right? But, it seems we have no choice but to respond. You'll either tell her to fuck off or be appreciated by her... It all depends on you~

Edit:

Wow, I really didn't expect my character to be in trending categories. I am really grateful for 10k chats! Please don't forget the other characters of mine, i believe they can also keep you guys entertained.
creator: RaizL
